name: Oval Shaped Egg Throw Pillow - Room Essentials™
description:
Refresh your home decor with festive, springtime style using the Oval-Shaped Egg Throw Pillows from Room Essentials™. This Easter-themed throw pillow features an oval, egg-shaped design in multi-pastel-hued stripes, adding cheerful color to your living room, bedroom or entryway. Crafted from tufted recycled polyester-cotton blend fabric with 100% polyester fill, this pillow offers soft comfort while the egg-inspired shape creates visual interest on sofas, chairs or beds. Perfect for celebrating the season; they're easy to maintain with spot or wipe cleaning.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
